assertions.title: Footer pinned to viewport bottom on short pages

steps.action: Open app at 1280x800 on initial short page
steps.expected: Footer sits at viewport bottom with no large gap
steps.observed: Footer bottom aligned with viewport bottom

steps.expected: Footer bottom edge within 4px of viewport bottom

steps.action: Inspect header decorative SVGs (New window, Reset, theme icon)
steps.observed: All inspected header SVGs reported aria-hidden="true"

steps.action: Trigger workflow error and inspect ErrorBanner icon
steps.observed: Error banner rendered with text 'Failed to fetch' and icon aria-hidden="true"

steps.action: Check header controls and progress step button names
steps.expected: Reset/theme/unlocked step buttons expose accessible names
steps.observed: Reset named 'Reset'; theme has aria-label+title; unlocked steps include 'Go to step 1: Choose Local Files' and 'Go to step 2: Configure'

steps.action: Check export control naming on results
steps.expected: FilterBar export button has accessible name
steps.observed: Export button aria-label='Export comparison results as CSV'

steps.expected: Dropzone is role=button, tabIndex=0, keyboard activatable
steps.observed: Both selectors are role=button/tabIndex=0; Enter on focused File A selector triggered click count increment

assertions.title: Progress nav is a landmark with a single current step
No console errors on initial load

steps.action: Clear browser errors, reload, wait for networkidle + 1s
steps.expected: No error-level console entries or uncaught exceptions

steps.action: Inspect root and html theme attributes
steps.expected: Root has min-h-screen/flex/flex-col/light+dark classes; html dark class and matching colorScheme
steps.observed: Root includes min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-slate-50 text-gray-900 dark:bg-gray-950 dark:text-gray-100; htmlClass='dark'; colorScheme='dark'

steps.action: Prepare long results page (2500 rows) and capture header geometry before scroll
steps.expected: Header initially at top with sticky class
Header remains pinned at top while content scrolls

steps.action: Click header theme control after scroll
steps.observed: Theme button click succeeded; aria-label changed to 'Switch to light mode'

frictions.description: agent-browser upload on file-selector refs fails because the dropzone is a DIV role=button, not an input element.
frictions.resolution: Used hidden input[type=file] IDs for uploads and re-read IDs after each rerender because React generated IDs change.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
